PreToolUse.command: powershell -Command "$java = java -version 2>&1; if ($java -like '*version*17*') { exit 0 } else { Write-Host 'ERROR: Java 17 required. Found:'; java -version; exit 2 }"
PreToolUse.windows: powershell -Command "$java = java -version 2>&1; if ($java -like '*version*17*') { exit 0 } else { Write-Host 'ERROR: Java 17 required. Found:'; java -version; exit 2 }"
PreToolUse.description: Validate Java 17 is installed before running build commands
